_comment: Manifest of OpenAPI version snapshots available for /v1/spec/diff. 'snapshot' entries have a full JSON file in this folder; 'changelog_only' entries point to the human changelog because the historical spec was not preserved in machine-readable form.

versions.notes: Snapshot for v4.53.1

Card Issuing v3 — Nium becomes the default virtual, digital and physical card issuer with Kora as automatic fallback. Adds cards-v3 (CRUD + lifecycle), cards-v3-reveal (step-up MFA PAN/CVV reveal, PCI SAQ-A compliant), and cards-v3-webhook (HMAC-verified normalized ingestion). Consumer PWA rebuilt with Nium-first UX, form-factor selection, physical card order & tracking. Homepage adds a dedicated Card Issuing section. Additive only — legacy virtual-cards and virtual-cards-v2 endpoints remain read-only for one minor version (Standing Orders 1, 2, 4, 6).
Webhooks section documents charge.succeeded and account.updated events with examples drawn from public signed fixtures.

Phase 5 consistency & hygiene. Every operation response in the production and sandbox specs now advertises X-RateLimit-Limit / X-RateLimit-Remaining / X-RateLimit-Reset, and every 429 response advertises Retry-After. Money-amount string schemas were audited for the zero-decimal currency pattern (^[0-9]{1,15}$); no regressions found. Additive metadata only (Standing Orders 1, 2, 4).

Promise to Pay (PTP) lifecycle. Additive endpoints and admin/consumer surfaces for creating, settling, partial-payment, rescheduling, sweeping, and breaking PTP arrangements, with outbound institution webhooks and detailed delivery logs.

Nium-powered Global Virtual Accounts (USD/EUR/GBP). Additive endpoints under /v1/gateway/global-accounts that issue real receiving accounts, settle inbound funds in XAF via Nium FX + configurable spread, and route to Kang Wallet or Mobile Money (Flutterwave). Legacy /v1/gateway/virtual-accounts (NGN/Wema) unchanged.

Phase 11 — integrator experience & governance. Adds enriched Postman environments (sandbox + production), admin send-test-webhook flow, institution API key admin console (create/rotate/suspend/revoke + usage), per-version OpenAPI export (JSON + YAML) with Postman 'Import Spec' UX, and ratchet tests for phases 10.2-10.5.

Phase 10.3 — Agent banking. Adds /v1/agents/* registry, float management, cash-in/cash-out and transaction history. Cites BIS Agent Banking Guidelines (2018), Mojaloop v1.1, GSMA Agent Network Management Toolkit v2.

Phase 10.1 — CEMAC coverage & inclusion (additive). Closes audit gaps for mobile-money provider coverage, virtual-account regional examples, CEMAC identity verification, RTP SLA hints, credit-score data sources, bilingual error catalogue, and LoanScheduleItem deprecated-field cleanup.

Phase 9 — High-priority gaps #6-#9 + per-tier rate limits. /v1/consents lifecycle façade, /v1/statements (camt.053.001.08), /v1/rate-limits, MobileMoneyErrorCode normalization, W3C Trace Context (traceparent/tracestate) on every operation.

Phase 8 — Scalability, DX & SDK Completeness. x-scalability vendor extension publishes the KV cache contract, typed SDK matrix (Node/Python/PHP/Go hand-tuned + TS/Py/Go/Java auto-generated), and k6 load harness SLOs.
Phase 7 — Fraud & Risk Enhancements. x-risk vendor extension publishes blocklist identifier types, merchant 30d baselines, and the configurable fail-closed threshold for high-value charges.
Phase 6 — Compliance & Data Retention. x-data-retention vendor extension publishes seeded retention horizons (kyc 7y, transactions 10y, consent 7y, webhooks 1y).
Phase 4 — Payment Orchestration Layer (feature-flagged). x-payment-orchestrator vendor extension; charge_dlq + 24h idempotency_cache_extended tables.
Phase 5 — Observability & SLOs. X-Trace-Id response header on every operation; x-observability vendor extension publishes SLO targets and trace propagation contract.
Phase 3 — Reconciliation closeout. Canonical x-state-machine, audit-exports bucket, reconciliation_mismatches Kanban columns.
Phase 2 — AuthZ scope matrix on bearerAuth, webhook circuit-breaker headers, X-Webhook-Replay header, webhook event registry page.
Phase 1 API contract hardening — cursor pagination parity, RFC 7807 error normalization, and X-Request-ID correlation across all 405 operations.
Virtual Card Issuing v2 release — Kora middleware for Banks and Developers.
Baseline snapshot. Adds 429/401/400 floors and X-Fapi-Interaction-Id.
Postman v4.27.2 published; provider webhook paths consolidated under /v1/webhooks/providers/*.
Marketplace splits, idempotency-keys table.
Provider webhooks moved to /v1/webhooks/providers/*.
v4 baseline release.
